Agent Patterns Documentation

Welcome to the Agent Patterns documentation. This project provides a collection of reusable agent patterns for building sophisticated AI agents.

Overview

Agent Patterns is a library that implements various agent architectures and patterns for large language model (LLM) applications. It provides a structured approach to building agents that can reason, use tools, maintain memory, and adapt their strategies.

Core Components

The library is built around these fundamental components:

  • Base Agent: The foundation for all agent patterns

  • Memory System: Enables agents to store and retrieve information

  • Tool System: Allows agents to interact with external systems

Patterns

The library includes the following agent patterns:

  • ReAct: Reason + Act pattern for alternating between reasoning and action

  • Reflexion: ReAct with reflection capabilities for self-improvement

  • LLM Compiler: Compilation-like approach separating planning from execution

  • Self-Discovery: Agents that discover their own capabilities

  • LATS: LangChain Agents Tracing System for observability

  • Reflection: Periodic reflection for strategic adjustment

  • ReWOO: Reason, World model, Observe, Outcome for simulation

  • Reflection and Refinement: Structured reflection with explicit refinement

  • Plan and Solve: Two-phase approach with planning and step execution

  • STORM: Comprehensive metacognitive framework for reasoning

For a comparison and selection guide, see the Patterns Overview.

Getting Started

To use Agent Patterns in your project:

from agent_patterns.patterns import ReActAgent, ReflexionAgent
from agent_patterns.core.tools import ToolRegistry
from agent_patterns.core.memory import CompositeMemory, EpisodicMemory

# Create tool registry with your tools
tool_registry = ToolRegistry([your_tools])

# Create memory system
memory = CompositeMemory({
    "episodic": EpisodicMemory()
})

# Configure LLM
llm_configs = {
    "default": {
        "provider": "openai",
        "model": "gpt-4o",
        "temperature": 0.7
    }
}

# Initialize an agent
agent = ReActAgent(
    llm_configs=llm_configs,
    tool_provider=tool_registry,
    memory=memory
)

# Run the agent
result = agent.run("Your task or query here")

Examples

Check the examples/ directory for implementation examples of each pattern.

Contributing

Contributions to Agent Patterns are welcome! See the GitHub repository for more information.
